arts.ttl: Man Utd Outcast Has More La Liga Goals Than Lamine Yamal and Vinicius Junior in 2025
arts.sum: Antony already scored more goals than Lamine Yamal and Vinícius Júnior combined in La Liga this year.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Champions League match against Manchester City
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s match against Manchester City in the return leg of the Champions League ’s Round of 32- Available Streaming : Paramount+, Fubo.TV

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Man City: Erling Haaland out to make Champions League history, break Lionel Messi record in playoff second leg
arts.sum: Erling Haaland will be aiming to earn a slice of Champions League history when Man City lock horns with Real Madrid at the Santiago Bernabeu for the second leg of their playoff tie on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: “It’s a hoax” – Javier Tebas reacts to reports of Real Madrid leaving La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have become infuriated with the state of refereeing in La Liga over the last couple of weeks, which everyone in Spanish football has become aware. The latest incident to cause ire was the red card shown to Jude Bellingham during last weekend’s 1-1 draw at Osasuna, a result that has since led to […] The post “It’s a hoax” – Javier Tebas reacts to reports of Real Madrid leaving La Liga appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: 'There was some interest': Real Madrid superstar admits Tottenham tried to sign him when he was just 19
Man City 22-man travelling squad vs Real Madrid confirmed amid Erling Haaland injury worry
arts.sum: Manchester City are flying to Spain to take on Real Madrid at the Bernabeu for their Champions League knock-out play-off second leg on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Real Madrid sanction MAJOR deal as Amorim handed boost
arts.sum: Real Madrid are willing to sell Eduardo Camavinga this summer, according to reports in Spain, and Manchester United are pushing to complete a surprise deal for the 22-year-old. PSG are currently deemed to be the favourites in the race to sign Camavinga, but Man Utd and Bayern are also keeping tabs on his situation in Spain and are reportedly ready to intensify their pursuit over the next few months.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid name official squad for Man City clash as key centre-back returns for crucial Champions League fixture
arts.sum: Real Madrid name their official 22-man squad for Wednesday's Champions League knockout round playoff second leg against Manchester City at the Santiago Bernabeu.
